build.beforeDevCommand: DIR=$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" 2>/dev/null && pwd); for d in . emulator-app; do [ -f "$d/scripts/deploy-apps.sh" ] && bash "$d/scripts/deploy-apps.sh" && exit 0; done; echo '[deploy] script not found, skipping'

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; media-src 'self' blob: mediastream:; frame-src 'self' https: http:
